room.caption: [G4-SC] You're free to choose your own path, just be prepared to complain about it to your congressman later.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(29) global.mapTeleport=9
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh8MainB)
bgFollow=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) bgFollow.type=3; bgFollow.backSet=backMM_SigmaC1 bgFollow.xMoveScale=0.6; bgFollow.yMoveScale=1 bgFollow.xAdjust=0; bgFollow.yAdjust=48 bgFollow.image_xscale=1.6; bgFollow.image_yscale=1.6 bgFollow.depth=1499999
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(412) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
